name: gsoc-poc-appcontainer
description: Native Windows AppContainer sandbox driver POC for Gemini CLI (GSoC 2026)

scripts.build: npm run build:native && npm run build:ts
scripts.prebuild: node -e "if(process.platform!=='win32'){console.error('ERROR: This package only builds on Windows (requires Win32 AppContainer APIs)');process.exit(1)}"
